data.title: GTCR Completes Acquisition of Zentiva, a Leading European Generics Pharmaceutical Company
data.description: Chicago-based GTCR private equity firm has finalized the acquisition of Zentiva in Prague on April 9, 2026. The deal aims to bolster Zentiva's growth by capitalizing on its reputation for quality, extensive reach, and dominant position in the market. GTCR will be injecting substantial resources into Zentiva to propel it into the next phase of expansion, leveraging the firm's strong foundation. This acquisition marks a significant move for both companies in the pharmaceutical sector, with GTCR's backing expected to provide a substantial boost to Zentiva's operations.

data.title: Ragnarok: Twilight Global Limited-Time CBT Now Live! Transform into Heroes and Experience the Brand-New RO!
data.description: Gravity Game Vision announced that Ragnarok: Twilight Global, the latest installment in the popular Ragnarok series, is set to conduct an Android Closed Beta Test (CBT) in various regions, such as Europe and North America. The game has been released and is now open for testing in these regions.

data.title: Optro Announces Agenda for CRX EMEA: Flagship Customer Conference
data.description: Exciting first-ever event across Europe, the Middle East, and Africa showcasing significant advancements in artificial intelligence. Key highlights include networking chances and insightful presentations by industry professionals and global risk authorities. The event is set to take place in London on April 9, 2026. Optro, previously known as AuditBoard, the top GRC platform leveraging AI technology, will be at the forefront of the event, providing transformative experiences for enterprises.

data.title: Notice to the Annual General Meeting of Duni AB (publ), May 18, 2026
data.description: In Malmö, Sweden on April 9, 2026, Duni AB has disclosed details about its Annual General Meeting scheduled for May 18, 2026 in compliance with the Nasdaq Stockholm listing agreement. The announcement was made via a press release. Shareholders of Duni AB (publ) should take note of this important date.

data.title: InCoax first to implement eQoS for MoCA Access in D-series platform
data.description: In Lund, Sweden on April 9, 2026, InCoax Networks announced the integration of enhanced Quality of Service (eQoS) into its D-series DPU platform, making it the pioneer in introducing eQoS to MoCA Access. This upgrade features advanced capabilities such as improved bandwidth distribution, classification of traffic, and management of congestion.

data.title: AVAX price at $9.04 eyes $9.65 resistance by mid-April. Neutral RSI at 47.88 indicates potential drop to $8.61 support.
data.description: The current price of Avalanche is $9.04, while the Relative Strength Index (RSI) stands at 47.88, indicating a neutral stance. Based on technical analysis, there is a possibility of the cryptocurrency testing the resistance level at $9.65 or falling to the support level at $8.61 in the next 1-2 weeks.

data.title: Matmut Group: Full Year 2025 results: Growth, diversification and financial strength - On track with 2025 strategic ambitions
data.description: Matmut Group is making significant progress towards achieving its strategic ambitions for 2025, focusing on growth, diversification, and financial stability. The company is aiming to expand its operations and enhance its offerings to meet the evolving needs of its customers. With a strong emphasis on financial strength, Matmut Group is well-positioned to achieve its growth targets. The company's dedication to its strategic goals underscores its commitment to success and sustainability.
